---
id: create-fedcm-flow
title: "Get FedCM Parameters"
description: "This endpoint returns a list of all available FedCM providers. It is only supported on the Ory Network."

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Get FedCM Parameters"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/self-service/fed-cm/parameters"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint returns a list of all available FedCM providers. It is only supported on the Ory Network.
